How to Play Circlo Unblocked

Circlo is a minimalist skill game where you control a spinning circle, timing your clicks to avoid obstacles and survive as long as possible. Clean design and addictive difficulty curve make it hard to put down. Play Circlo unblocked with no download from our fast GitHub mirror.

Controls

  • Left Click / Spacebar — reverse spin direction

FAQ: Is Circlo unblocked for school?

Yes! Circlo is fully unblocked here and plays in any browser. No download needed.
